notes: With-skill achieves 100% pass rate on both new evals (19/19 assertions)
Key differentiators: shadow factory pattern (0% without skill), renderGradientBar usage (0% without skill), FaArrowRight icons (0% without skill), ROUNDED_RECTANGLE for badges (0% without skill)
Non-discriminating assertions: file existence, pixel-to-inch helper, async awaiting, no # prefix — pass in both configurations
The skill's REQUIRED badge pattern and shadow factory are the most impactful guidance
